name: 5B Unit 5 - Past Experiences
description: 關於 Past Experiences 的閱讀理解問答
creator: 系統預置

questions.question: How did Carol feel about the camping trip?
questions.answer: She thought it was an exciting experience.

questions.question: What presents did Pete get?
questions.answer: He got a bicycle and a video game.

questions.question: Why did Megan's family have to stay indoors during their holiday last summer?
questions.answer: It was because it rained heavily every day.

questions.question: Who did Kevin become good friends with later?
questions.answer: He became good friends with the monitor and other classmates.
